steps.title: Identify the core contradiction
steps.content: The notes reveal that scientists hypothesized collapse temperature would vary with molecular properties, but the 2023 study found it “nearly independent of material and fluid properties, contrary to previous theories.” This is the assumption being refuted.

steps.title: Match the refutation
steps.content:
C directly refutes the assumption by stating collapse temperature “does not vary depending on material and fluid properties,” matching the study's finding.
  • A addresses the wrong phenomenon
  • B claims the opposite of what the study found
  • D conflates formation and collapse
, obscuring the specific refutation.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
